# TAURET

> Premium futuristic sportswear engineered for elite athletes across tennis, football, basketball, cycling, gym, and more.

TAURET designs and sells high-performance sports clothing with a deep-space / cyberpunk aesthetic. The catalog is focused on apparel only — no equipment or footwear.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand introduction, featured products, and sport categories.
- [Shop](/shop): Full product catalog with filters by sport and category.
- [Wishlist](/wishlist): Saved products (also shareable via link).
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side product comparison.
- [Help Center](/help): FAQs about shipping, returns, sizing, payments, and orders.

## Optional

- [Cart](/cart): User shopping cart.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account login and registration.
